title: heliosperma quadrifidum
intro: Heliosperma quadrifidum, also known as the Four-leafed Alpine, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Primulaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues such as bloating and flatulence. The health benefits of Heliosperma quadrifidum include reducing inflammation, acting as a natural diuretic, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of tinctures or infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
